title: SYNTHETIC rear-yard minimum (representability demonstration)
description: SYNTHETIC second-family fixture proving a structurally different rule family (a minimum rear-yard depth in linear feet - a floor, not a ratio times area) is representable with ZERO engine changes (M4-T001 RE-S5). Illustrative values only; not a Verified determination and not an official capture.

citations.quote: SYNTHETIC (not verbatim from any source): For the purposes of this representability demonstration, a minimum rear yard depth of 30 feet applies in the indicated district.

inputs.name: lot_depth_ft
inputs.description: Optional lot depth (unused by this minimal demo; present to show optional-input handling).

outputs.name: min_rear_yard_depth_ft
outputs.description: Minimum required rear-yard depth in feet.

limitations: SYNTHETIC representability demonstration; illustrative value; requires official capture + G6 before any use.
